NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CERTIFICATE OF MAILING ORDER AND AMENDED JUDGMENT ON APRIL 7, 2011 IS FILED

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-02-2010 IN DEPT. 501, JUDGMENT FOR THE RESPONDENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER WITH A BLANK SPACE AS TO THE AMOUNT TO BE AWARDED. JUDGE R. QUIDACHAY, CLERK R. PASCUAL, REPORTER R. BALIAN.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO RESPONDENT CANEL, RIGOBERTO
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-06-2011 3:00 PM FOR DEPT 501

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT CANEL, RIGOBERTO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF ALFARO, ANDRES $12,072.00 PRINCIPAL, $8,678.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,585.00 INTEREST, $763.00 COSTS, $444.00 PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,542.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $763.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE FEB-09-2011, FILED BY RESPONDENT CANEL, RIGOBERTO

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-06-2011 IN DEPT. 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS GRANTED, RESPONDENT IS AWARDED $8,678.50 PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER. COURT SIGNS ORDER AND AMENDED JUDGMENT. ALFARO IS PRESENT IN PRO PER AND JOSEPH BRAVO IS PRESENT FOR THE RESPONDENT RIGOBERTO CANEL. JUDGE QUIDACHAY, CLERK KEVIN LEE, CSR BOB BALIAN, D501
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO RESPONDENT CANEL, RIGOBERTO
